schema.composition_key: Stable hash of normalized composition: alphabetically sorted elements at 4-decimal mole-fraction precision.
schema.canonical_phase: One of BCC, FCC, HCP, multi-phase. Empty when sources disagree.
schema.has_conflict: 1 if any pair of contributing sources gave different canonical labels.
schema.borg_processing: Preserved side-channel from Borg only. Not part of join key.

consolidation_rules.label_policy: agreement → canonical; disagreement → has_conflict=1, canonical_phase blank
consolidation_rules.borg_processing: Preserved as side-channel; not part of join key
consolidation_rules.per_source_dedup: Each loader deduplicates internally before consolidation
